# Leonardo Cofone

> Leonardo Cofone is a 17-year-old AI Researcher & Engineer from Italy, focused on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Large Language Models (LLMs). He builds and researches intelligent systems and real-world AI applications, working with both pre-trained and custom models, and developing AI agents capable of learning, reasoning and solving real-world tasks.

Official website: https://leonardocofone.github.io/Leonardo_Cofone/

## Profile

- **Name:** Leonardo Cofone
- **Role:** AI Researcher & Engineer
- **Age:** 17
- **Location:** Trento, Italy
- **Education:** Galileo Galilei Scientific High School, Trento (expected graduation: June 2028)
- **Core skills:** Python (advanced), C++ (basic), Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, LLMs, AI agents, prompt engineering, neural networks, predictive modeling.

## Experience

- **AI Developer — EgoLog S.r.l.** (August 2025 – February 2026): Designed, developed and deployed AI agent systems using n8n to automate workflows and repetitive business processes.
- **AI Developer — Top Evolution Srl** (June 2025 – August 2025): Built AI automation projects, designing and optimizing machine learning pipelines and integrating models into real-world workflows.

## Research & Projects

- **DSALT — Dynamic Sparse Attention with Landmark Tokens**: Research on Transformer attention mechanisms. Introduces a dynamic sparse attention mechanism combining local windowed attention with globally selected landmark tokens (hybrid energy-based scoring) to improve long-context efficiency and representation quality.
  - Paper (Zenodo): https://zenodo.org/records/19312826
  - Official Python library: https://github.com/LeonardoCofone/dsalt-library
- **LerriAI**: A personal AI assistant built as a system of intelligent agents that plan, remind, summarize and track progress to help users organize their lives.
  - Repo: https://github.com/LeonardoCofone/LerriAI

## Certifications

- Machine Learning Specialization — Andrew Ng, Stanford University (94h)
- Supervised Machine Learning — DeepLearning.AI (33h)
- Unsupervised ML, Recommenders, Reinforcement Learning — DeepLearning.AI (27h)
- Advanced Learning Algorithms — DeepLearning.AI (34h)
- Computer Vision & Image Processing — IBM (22h)
- Machine Learning Capstone — IBM (20h)
- Machine Learning with Python — IBM (20h)
